flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ouachita Baptist University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.1k → $34.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ouachita Baptist University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.1k → $34.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ouachita Baptist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
